'''âl-l-d''' ('''lalada''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:varietize|varietize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-l-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:varietize|varietize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-l-d
|-
! Lemma
| lalada
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:laladithi|laladithi]] || [[word:laladiji|laladiji]] || [[word:laladishi|laladishi]] || [[word:laladi|laladi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:laladuthuth|laladuthuth]] || [[word:laladujuj|laladujuj]] || [[word:laladushush|laladushush]] || [[word:lalad|lalad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:laladuthu|laladuthu]] || [[word:laladuju|laladuju]] || [[word:laladushu|laladushu]] || [[word:laladu|laladu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:laladufuth|laladufuth]] || [[word:laladufuj|laladufuj]] || [[word:laladufush|laladufush]] || [[word:laladuf|laladuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:laladethe|laladethe]] || [[word:laladeje|laladeje]] || [[word:laladeshe|laladeshe]] || [[word:lalade|lalade]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:laladothoth|laladothoth]] || [[word:laladojoj|laladojoj]] || [[word:laladoshosh|laladoshosh]] || [[word:lalad|lalad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:laladotho|laladotho]] || [[word:laladojo|laladojo]] || [[word:laladosho|laladosho]] || [[word:lalado|lalado]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:laladofoth|laladofoth]] || [[word:laladofoj|laladofoj]] || [[word:laladofosh|laladofosh]] || [[word:laladof|laladof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:laladĂŠthĂŠ|laladĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:laladĂŠjĂŠ|laladĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:laladĂŠshĂŠ|laladĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:laladĂŠ|laladĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:laladathath|laladathath]] || [[word:laladajaj|laladajaj]] || [[word:laladashash|laladashash]] || [[word:lalad|lalad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:laladatha|laladatha]] || [[word:laladaja|laladaja]] || [[word:laladasha|laladasha]] || [[word:lalada|lalada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:laladafath|laladafath]] || [[word:laladafaj|laladafaj]] || [[word:laladafash|laladafash]] || [[word:laladaf|laladaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:laladasha|laladasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:golaladasha|golaladasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokilaladasha|gokilaladasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:laladnĂŒsha|laladnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:golaladnknĂŒsha|golaladnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokilaladnĂŒsha|gokilaladnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:laladshĂ«sha|laladshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golaladnkshĂ«sha|golaladnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilaladshĂ«sha|gokilaladshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:laladrosha|laladrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:golaladnkrosha|golaladnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilaladrosha|gokilaladrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:laladmusha|laladmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:golaladnkmusha|golaladnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilaladmusha|gokilaladmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:laladsherasha|laladsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:golaladnksherasha|golaladnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokilaladsherasha|gokilaladsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:laladngasha|laladngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:golaladnkngasha|golaladnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokilaladngasha|gokilaladngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:laladyasha|laladyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:golaladnkyasha|golaladnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokilaladyasha|gokilaladyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:laladyamasha|laladyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:golaladnkyamasha|golaladnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokilaladyamasha|gokilaladyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:laladnĂŒshĂ«sha|laladnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:golaladnknĂŒshĂ«sha|golaladnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilaladnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokilaladnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:laladnĂŒrosha|laladnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golaladnknĂŒrosha|golaladnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilaladnĂŒrosha|gokilaladnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:laladnĂŒmusha|laladnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golaladnknĂŒmusha|golaladnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilaladnĂŒmusha|gokilaladnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:laladshĂ«nĂŒsha|laladshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:golaladnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|golaladnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilaladshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokilaladshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:laladshĂ«rosha|laladshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golaladnkshĂ«rosha|golaladnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilaladshĂ«rosha|gokilaladshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:laladshĂ«musha|laladshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golaladnkshĂ«musha|golaladnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilaladshĂ«musha|gokilaladshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:laladronĂŒsha|laladronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:golaladnkronĂŒsha|golaladnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilaladronĂŒsha|gokilaladronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:laladroshĂ«sha|laladroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:golaladnkroshĂ«sha|golaladnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilaladroshĂ«sha|gokilaladroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:laladromusha|laladromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golaladnkromusha|golaladnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilaladromusha|gokilaladromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:laladmunĂŒsha|laladmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:golaladnkmunĂŒsha|golaladnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilaladmunĂŒsha|gokilaladmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:laladmushĂ«sha|laladmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:golaladnkmushĂ«sha|golaladnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilaladmushĂ«sha|gokilaladmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:laladmurosha|laladmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golaladnkmurosha|golaladnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilaladmurosha|gokilaladmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:lalad|lalad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lĂŠlĂŠd|lĂŠlĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:holalad|holalad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:holĂŠlĂŠd|holĂŠlĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoholalad|hoholalad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoholĂŠlĂŠd|hoholĂŠlĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒlalad|nĂŒlalad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒlĂŠlĂŠd|nĂŒlĂŠlĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒlalad|nĂŒnĂŒlalad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒlĂŠlĂŠd|nĂŒnĂŒlĂŠlĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻlalad|nĂŻlalad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻlĂŠlĂŠd|nĂŻlĂŠlĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻlalad|nĂŻnĂŻlalad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻlĂŠlĂŠd|nĂŻnĂŻlĂŠlĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lulalad|lulalad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lulĂŠlĂŠd|lulĂŠlĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lululalad|lululalad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lululĂŠlĂŠd|lululĂŠlĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lilalad|lilalad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lilĂŠlĂŠd|lilĂŠlĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lililalad|lililalad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lililĂŠlĂŠd|lililĂŠlĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kolalad|kolalad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kolĂŠlĂŠd|kolĂŠlĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokolalad|kokolalad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokolĂŠlĂŠd|kokolĂŠlĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kelalad|kelalad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kelĂŠlĂŠd|kelĂŠlĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekelalad|kekelalad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekelĂŠlĂŠd|kekelĂŠlĂŠd]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
